# LIMINIQ

> Custom software, SaaS, and enterprise development company in India — backed by data-driven SEO and digital marketing.

## About

- **Name:** LIMINIQ
- **Website:** https://www.liminiq.com
- **Founded:** 2019
- **Location:** India (serving clients globally)
- **Contact:** hello@liminiq.com · +91 9431471654
- **Projects delivered:** 150+
- **Client rating:** 4.9/5

## Core services

1. **Custom Software & SaaS Development** — Multi-tenant SaaS, enterprise portals, legacy modernization, API layers, cloud deployment.
2. **Digital Marketing** — Google & Meta ads, landing page CRO, lead generation, performance marketing.
3. **SEO & Search Marketing** — Technical SEO, content strategy, link building, local SEO.
4. **Web & E-commerce** — Next.js / React storefronts and custom web applications.
5. **Mobile Apps** — iOS and Android (React Native).
6. **UI/UX Design & Branding** — Product design, design systems, prototyping.
7. **Graphic Design & Creative** — Social creatives, pitch decks, brand assets.
8. **Content & Copywriting** — SEO blog writing, landing page copy.
9. **AI, Automation & Cloud** — LLM chatbots, workflow automation, cloud migration.

## Starting rates (India, indicative)

- Custom software / SaaS: from ₹75,000 per project
- Web & e-commerce: from ₹24,999
- SEO: from ₹14,999
- Digital marketing: from ₹19,999

Final quotes are scoped after a free discovery call.
